rent.note: furnished 1BR near Escazú or Barrio Escalante; avg $683, range $500–$1,000

utilities.note: electric + water + internet $65 avg; broadband well developed

groceries.note: home cooking; imported goods expensive, local produce affordable

transit.note: public transport $13–$30/month; very affordable by global standards

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; strong coworking scene in Escazú/San Pedro

misc.note: gym, toiletries, entertainment, weekend beach/nature trips, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.claim: comfortable nomad budget $1,500–$2,000/month; San José at $1,565 overall
evidence.quote: San Jose sits at $1,565 for overall monthly costs, making it one of the pricier cities in Costa Rica
The average 1-bedroom apartment in San José costs $683.00/month, while apartment prices near the city center range from $500 to $1000 per month
Broadband internet in San José averages $65 monthly
Public transport ($13.00) is 61% below the global median, making it very affordable
